title: A Gantt project flow without dates - Indicative Timeline

posts.author: SarahLeaf (Sarah)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to create a Gantt that has just indicative Year, Month, Quarters.
So not actually choose a particular year. Just the headline Year, Month etc
So your timeline is an example of what a project will look like depending on when it starts. But not actually give an start date.
